title: But what exactly are world models?
summary: World models are algorithms that learn to represent and predict the dynamics of environments. They come in two main approaches: generative models that synthesize realistic observations and predictive models that forecast future states. Applications include synthetic data generation, interactive environment simulation, and autonomous agent planning.
